body: Generalizes FV <-> Spectral Element remapping to handle arbitrary polynomial orders.
title: Arbitrary order 1D spectral element remapping

body:
This PR widens the allocation monitoring for the implicit solve to include OrginaryDiffEq.jl's `step!` routine. This should reveal if where more allocations are coming from.

Also, I changed from `$(Base.julia_cmd()) --project=examples/ --track-allocation=all perf/allocs_per_case.jl $args`  to `$(Base.julia_cmd()) --project=perf/ --track-allocation=all perf/allocs_per_case.jl $args` to ensure that I grab the correct package directories, otherwise we could silently miss allocations if the deps are different.
title: Widen allocation monitoring for implicit solve case

body:
(with @LenkaNovak)

This adds a function to export ClimaCore meshes in Exodus II format. I've added it into a ClimaCoreTempestRemap subpackage, as that is currently the main reason we need it, so we can add further functionality there as well.
title: exodus format export function
Check in Manifest for docs, update build scripts and README

body: Since ClimaComms is 1.7 only, we can't merge #373. Given performance issues on 1.6, it isn't worth supporting.
title: drop 1.6 support, add nightly tests
